programme.desc: One of the biggest surf days ever at Teahpoo in Tahiti. Interview with Surfing Hall of Famer Brock Little. We catch big fish from a kayak with big game kayak angler, Jim Salmons, and hit Maui’s windsurfing hot spots with Robbie Naish.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep103: Angel Sharks Reef Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV highlights endangered Angel Sharks in California’s Channel Islands and dives with Reef Sharks in Mexico.

programme.title: Blue World Ep501: Tiger Sharks + Crystal Cave of Abaco
programme.desc: Blue World travels to the Bahamas, and gets up close and personal with Tiger Sharks. Next, we join world-renown cave explorer Brian Kakuk to investigate the Crystal Cave of Abaco…considered the world’s most highly-ornamented underwater cave!

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Season Recap
programme.desc: Season finale - Greatest moments! What is our favorite catch? What was the most difficult episode? Check out this finale of our greatest moments of the season to hear our toughest and best moments from the recent season!

programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We travel with local surfer Mikey Brennan as he and friends explore the secluded East Coast of Tasmania, the Tasman Peninsula and famed Shipstern Bluff where they find incredible scenery and epic waves.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep103
programme.desc: One of the biggest surf days ever at Teahpoo in Tahiti. Interview with Surfing Hall of Famer Brock Little. programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Club Düsseldorf

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to episode 3 of The Polo Show. This time we travel to the home of polo for a special look at the iconic English season. programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: This is episode 4 of The Polo Show. We take a look back at the highlights from some of the most prestigious polo tournaments that dominated the European circuit this summer. We will enjoy of olympic history in Berlin with the German Open, horseriding in the beautiful beach or enjoying the French Riviera at the exclusive Saint-Tropez Polo Club in this episode. Come for a ride with us!

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.desc: Experience Norway's winter beauty in stunning pictures, with aerial views of majestic fjords, the Atlantic Ocean Road, and the Trollstigen mountain pass. Enjoy serene music and natural sounds as you explore the iconic landscapes and fishing villages like Bud.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Escape daily stress with this video showcasing breathtaking natural landscapes. Relax to soothing piano music and nature sounds, from waterfalls and mountains to serene beaches and fjords.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The tuning company MTM went to work on Audi's already super-powerful S8 luxury sedan and created the S8 Talladega R. Alpina's B6 Biturbo Gran Coupe easily beats its BMW counterpart and makes the road vibrate.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Many of today's supercars rely on hybrid technology or even drive purely electrically. We take a look at the sports cars of the future and try to get an insight into the latest and planned technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 50 years the Porsche 911 has been holding the crown as one of the best sports cars in the world. Two manufacturers recently jousted with the 911, with the Jaguar F-Type R and the Mercedes AMG GT S as Porsche’s rivals.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With its extravagant design the Lexus NX200t definitely stands out. Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is more conservative in that regard. The QX30 features a classic Infiniti design with a curved bonnet. Also: the city SUV Mazda CX-3.

programme.title: 4x4

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America

programme.title: Falling Angels

programme.title: Gunnie Season

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: Le Défi Azimut - Episode 1
programme.desc: One month before the Vendée Globe 2016, the best Imoca skippers were able to test their boat for the last time during the sixth edition of the Défi Azimut. Every year, this festive weekend provides an opportunity for all stakeholders in ocean sailing to see the Imoca 60 boats and to meet their skipper on the dock.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E12 - Autumn East to West
programme.desc: A cop on the east side of Michigan comes across a driver without a license, while another officer on the west side is keeping an eye on a state game area during a waterfowl hunt.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E10 - Naturally Potent
programme.desc: Explore the unspoilt mountains of Lapland and on to the pristine Swiss Alps. In contrast we then travel to Champagne Province in France - home of the finest wines in the world. Finally, Gibraltar beckons with its long history and strange mysterious caves.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E11 - Naturally Different
programme.desc: The Shetland Islands: home to 20,000 humans, one million birds and the smallest horse in the world. Then on to an area known to the locals as the Centre of the World in South Eastern province of Kazakhstan. From there we will go to the Yellow Mountains in Central China often called The Venice of China.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E11 - Prospectors and Miners
programme.desc: It's a big year for the Cripple River mining camp in Nome Alaska. The crew is extremely busy and the participants are already finding some of the biggest gold in recent history.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E12 - One Dredge: Tons of Gold
programme.desc: Tom's been dredging a spot on Arctic creek for the past couple years. Now is the time he and Kia are gonna open the hole up in hopes of finding some serious gold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On
programme.desc: William and Catherine got married in a fairytale ceremony on April 29, 2011, with more than two billion people tuning in and celebrations happening all around the world.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Marseille
programme.desc: "German cinema can be this exciting: Angela Schanelec's fourth film MARSEILLE" (taz)

programme.title: Afternoon
programme.desc: On 3 summer afternoons, a family meets up a beautiful house in an upscale Berlin neighborhood. They come together but ultimately drift further apart.

programme.title: MansFeld
programme.desc: A magical film about the mysteries of childhood and an old custom: In the village of MANSFELD, the ritual banishment of the old takes place every year
Marc is a surfer and lives his life one day at a time. But after many strokes of fate, he dreams of turning back time, and starting all over again.

programme.title: Heiko's World
programme.desc: From YouTube to the cinemas: In this loving homage to Berlin's pub culture, Berlin original Heiko must win a darts tournament.

programme.title: Gender Crisis
programme.desc: Samson and Delilah: The Old Testament story of a man with irrepressible strength - as a silent film, told in a modern way.

programme.title: Motorcity
programme.desc: A compelling exploration of the complexities of American life, history, and society through the lens of the unique and fascinating sport drag racing.

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 5

programme.title: God Knows, You Don't
programme.desc: Faith isn’t a destination. In “God Knows You Don’t,” Pastor Steven shows us that even though we don’t know what’s next, we can trust that God is guiding our steps.

programme.title: What Can God Do With Damage?
programme.desc: No matter what you’ve lost, the value is still in you. In “What Can God Do With Damage?,” Pastor Michael Todd reminds us that God can take what’s damaged and do a miracle that no one can disqualify.

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 6

programme.title: Expecting Change
programme.desc: God doesn’t just want to “fix” you, He wants to restore you. Right now, He’s transforming you to impact others. Expect more than a personal breakthrough; expect God to exceed your expectations and bless others through your life.

programme.desc: Pablo once again asks Malena to return to the house or else he will make public his "romance" with Isabel. Gertrudis' argument has no effect on Alberto, who is willing to continue investigating his father's murder. Guillermo arrives armed in front of the Corona's house, with the intention of killing Alberto for trying to take Lorena's love away from him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo mocks Lorena, reminding her that she can never be happy with Alberto because she carries the weight of her father's death on her conscience. Ricardo ends up kissing one of the Marias, surprising Paulina in horror. Pablo shows Gertrudis the divorce papers, which she approves of, not caring that it will destroy not only Isabel but also her own daughter: Malena. Guillermo ultimately confesses to Lorena that Gertrudis has put a price on his head and that Pedro has orders to kill her.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Upon entering the Santa Maria mansion with her suitcases, Clara meets Raul, whom she receives lovingly. Clara kisses him in love, although Raul holds back.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara confronts Raul at the clinic, decrees that she will sink Pastora for trying to kill Anastasio.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Loaded with bags of ingredients for her erotic food and her odalisque costume, Patricia gets ready to "work" in her hotel room.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana refuses to believe that Carlos Raul has left his girlfriend; the doctor swears he is not lying to her as Azalea approaches asking what the couple is talking about.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: The mysterious woman named Marcelina is a mystery to Camila and Max think they are closer to finding her. The war between the Lopez and Aragon families continues. Max and Camila visit the orphanage.

programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Piensan que es Rosa Blanco quien desató la guerra entre las familias. La Madre Isabel piensa comunicar la noticia a Camila que cree que ella es su madre. Ezequiel y Fausto armados, se enfrentan.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila vende galletas en la peluquería, la dueña la descubre y se los bota al basurero. Comienza su contacto con Max que la defiende pero ella lo agrede y es detenida.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Hay química entre Camila y Max. Explosión en Mascarada. Max y Ezequiel a punto de enfrentarse por Camila. Ella siempre pensando que a su Mamá la envuelve un misterio.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Una nerviosa reunión entre Ezequiel y la Madre Isabel intriga a Camila. Max apoya a Camila en su trabajo y le ofrece ayudar en la búsqueda de su madre.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pasillos se rumora que Max apadrina a Camila a cambio de sexo. Un disparo mantiene a Javier sin reacciones. Se enfrentan Camila y Marcelina, siempre por el asunto de su madre y luego Camila decide disculparse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La misteriosa mujer que nombra Marcelina es una incógnita para Camila y Max piensan que están más cerca de encontrarla. Continúa la guerra entre las familias López y Aragón. Max y Camila visitan el orfanato.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: Error 113
programme.desc: Cuatro extraños se encuentran en el apartamento 113 invitados por Annie Annie, una aplicación de inteligencia artificial que ayuda a las personas con sus problemas cotidianos. Annie Annie les ha dicho que la aplicación es en realidad una persona real y que se van a encontrar cara a cara. Después de un tiempo, estos extraños comienzan a sentirse incómodos a medida que se dan cuenta de que Annie no va a poder hacerlo.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
